title: IQ what it measures
script_summary: Exploring what IQ really measures beyond just numbers.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about IQ.
IQ tests measure a range of cognitive abilities, not just what you think.
It includes problem-solving, reasoning, and even your ability to learn.
Research shows that while IQ can predict academic success, it doesn't measure creativity or emotional intelligence.
So, IQ is just one piece of a much bigger puzzle of intelligence.
Curious about your own IQ? Check your learning style next! Like and follow for more insights!
